summary: Iteration 93 - Active Duty Navigation Bug Fixes testing completed. Fixed SurferSessionHub.js to use correct field name 'is_available' instead of 'on_demand_available' for on-demand toggle API. All features verified working: OnDemandDutyIcon navigates to /photographer/on-demand-settings, On-Demand toggle API works, Active Duty drawer shows correct structure.

minor.issue: Duplicate endpoint definition at lines 1767 and 1812 in photographer.py - second definition is dead code

action_items: OPTIONAL: Remove duplicate on-demand-toggle endpoint definition at line 1812 in photographer.py (dead code)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: SurferSessionHub.js was sending 'on_demand_available' but backend expects 'is_available' - changed to 'is_available'
SurferSessionHub.js shows 'Active Duty' label for photographers (not 'Photo Hub')
Active Duty drawer has correct hierarchy: Go On-Demand toggle, Go Live button, Other Shooters, Scheduled Sessions
Backend has duplicate endpoint definition for on-demand-toggle but first one is used correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Active Duty navigation bug fixes verified. OnDemandDutyIcon in TopNav shows On-Demand Duty drawer with toggle, Other Shooters Nearby, and On-Demand Settings. On-Demand Settings navigates to /photographer/on-demand-settings. SurferSessionHub shows 'Active Duty' for photographers with Go On-Demand toggle, Go Live, Other Shooters, Scheduled Sessions. Backend on-demand-toggle API uses is_available field.

features_verified.active_duty_label: VERIFIED - SurferSessionHub shows 'Active Duty' label for photographers
features_verified.go_on_demand_toggle: VERIFIED - Active Duty drawer shows Go On-Demand toggle with yellow styling
features_verified.go_live_button: VERIFIED - Active Duty has Go Live button (green gradient)
features_verified.other_shooters_button: VERIFIED - Active Duty has Other Shooters button
features_verified.scheduled_sessions_button: VERIFIED - Active Duty has Scheduled Sessions button
features_verified.on_demand_toggle_api: VERIFIED - POST /api/photographer/{id}/on-demand-toggle works with is_available field

bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to 'is_available' field in on-demand-toggle API call
